All the in app purchases are written in Symbols letters & #'s there are no actual amounts 4 u to know how much you need to purchase to get what you want in the app. You buy $20 and they tell u it's not enough bit never tell you how much more you need! They never tell you how much the thing you want to purchase is to begin with!! It's confusing and it literally just keeps taking your money until it sees fit that you have enough to cover your purchase but never tell you how much it actually costs. Unless you aren't planning on buying anything I highly suggest you choose another game. I have already reported the app to Meta & they will be looking into these false amounts further. FYI.
